name: Jalapeno Corn Bread Stuffing
recipeInstructions:
1. Preparation Time: 0:45
- Prepare Cornbread:
a. Preheat oven to 400-degrees.
b. Grease a 13 by 9-inch baking pan.
c. In a large bowl, combine cornmeal, flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt.
d. In a separate bowl, mix milk, 1/2 cup oil, and eggs.
e. Pour the milk mixture into the flour mixture and stir only until moistened.
f. Pour the batter into the greased pan.
g. Bake for 25-30 minutes or until golden brown. Cool on a wire rack.
h. When firm enough to handle, cut cornbread into 1-inch cubes.
2. Heat remaining 3 tablespoons of oil in a large saucepan over medium heat.
a. Add bacon and fry until crisp.
b. Drain cooked bacon on paper towels and crumble.
c. Set aside.
d. Add onions to the pan and saute for 5 minutes.
e. Add celery, jalapeno peppers, and oregano; saute for 1 minute longer.
f. Stir cornbread cubes into the sauteed vegetables.
g. Add just enough chicken broth to moisten the stuffing.
h. Cook until heated through.
i. Sprinkle with crumbled bacon and toss lightly.
j. Transfer to a serving dish.
